title: CoffeeG's Wall Climbing
description: Add Wall Climb mechanic to minecraft
body:
# THIS DATAPACK/MOD NOW REQUIRE [FokusAPI](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fokusapi)
# 🛠 **Wall Climb**!
> Simple datapack to add Wall Climbing mechanic to minecraft ✔


## Compatible 
Support Version : **1.13 -> up** \
**NOTES: IF YOU WANT TO FIND `1.13 -> 1.15` VERSION, GO TO VERSIONS TAB** 

> ⚠️ Warning : The full supported version is **1.16 -> up**. **1.13 -> 1.15** will receive fewer updates and fixes.

Platform : **Mod[ NeoForge,Forge,Fabric,Quilt ] ; Datapack**

## Features
> All features below can be customized using `/function motion:menu/main`
+ Wall Climbing : Jump into a vertical surface and then press sneak
(Tips: You can use it as a Wall Jump alternative too)
  + Quick Trigger (Disabled by default): Don't need to press sneak to trigger Wall Climbing mechanic - Just jump. Thanks `ProducerMZ` for awesome suggestion
+ Custom Climbing time (2.0 or above) 
  + Using `scoreboard players set $wc.bonus bonus_time <BT>`
  + BT : Bonus Time (number) , default : 0
+ Action Bar

### Demo: 
- ⚠ Warning: To climb wall, first you need to stand at the wall. Hold shift first and then press jump  
- Third person: \
    ![image](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbjNhMmd5YTJzc3ZmeWZhOXA1NHpyejh6Y2lzcDhjOXhvdDZkZHZtaiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/6wU8bwwKlJtI1tUNq0/giphy.gif)
- First person:\
    ![image](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZWo5Y2IxNGt3OTVvYTdsbmlrdzQyMWZwbjVweDVqcW9wczJvYTVnYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/09wlLPmc9Z0kheH5Ue/giphy.gif)


## Try my other datapacks/mods:
+ [**Brutal Nightmare**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Minecraft, but with insane difficulty. Zombie place/break blocks, throw TNT. Skeleton, Creeper, Ghasts, Spider,Phantom,... get new abilities.New mini bosses...
+ [**Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**Adrenaline Rush**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/adrenaline-rush) - Add "final shout" & "second chance" mechanic into minecraft! You'll have 0,5 HP instead of dying when fall from height ; Buff your power when you at low HP
+ [**Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob.
+ [**Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
## Uninstall
You easily remove datapack file(.zip) from datapacks folder
